LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_FMJ.label: 12x25mm Judgement (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_FMJ.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. It is primarily used by high-power semi-automatics and submachineguns.
LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_AP.label: 12x25mm Judgement (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_AP.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. It is primarily used by high-power semi-automatics and submachineguns.
LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_HP.label: 12x25mm Judgement (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_12x25Judgement_HP.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. It is primarily used by high-power semi-automatics and submachineguns.
LanguageData.Bullet_12x25Judgement_FMJ.label: 12x25mm Judgement bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_12x25Judgement_AP.label: 12x25mm Judgement bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_12x25Judgement_HP.label: 12x25mm Judgement bullet (HP)
